The painterly, impressionistic technique emphasizes mood over detail, evoking deep melancholy and isolation while suggesting a fragile sanctuary within the lamp's protective glow.

external.description:
BrainChip at the Edge AI Foundation Generative Edge AI Forum 
BrainChip's Solutions Architect, Ritik Shrivastava, presented on running generative AI locally at the edge. Ritik introduced BrainChip's open 1.2 billion parameter state space model, available for the community to download, fine-tune, and deploy on edge devices with lower memory

external.description:
Intelligent Radar Classification with Neuromorphic AI  

Radar has long been a foundational sensing technology in defense and critical infrastructure. It excels at detecting objects at distance, operating reliably in darkness, smoke, fog, and adverse weather where optical systems fail. Yet traditional radar systems can determine where an object is, but not necessarily what it
external.title: Intelligent Radar Classification with Neuromorphic AI
